result.reason: Keyboard shortcuts are defined using System.Windows.Forms.Keys enum values which may not translate correctly across all national keyboard layouts, leading to conflicts.
result.approach: Intercept keyboard input at a lower level (e.g., via IMessageFilter or by enhancing ProcessCmdKey) to account for national keyboard layouts, ensuring consistent shortcut recognition. This might involve mapping virtual key codes to a normalized representation or using a library that handles keyboard layout variations.
